mapper.sql: a.id as id ,a.exam_id as examId ,a.question_type as questionType ,a.question_title as questionTitle ,a.option_json as optionJson ,a.correct_answer as correctAnswer ,a.question_score as questionScore ,a.sort_no as sortNo ,a.analysis_text as analysisText ,a.is_deleted as isDeleted ,a.create_time as createTime
